title: Repository README and timeline refinement
summary: Repository overview now keeps the snapshot timeline as the single snapshot list, places it beside the README on desktop, stacks it on mobile, hides vertical overflow in the tab strip, and adds copy actions to README code blocks.
userVisibleChange: Repository pages no longer show a vertical scrollbar in the tab bar, README code blocks can be copied, and the overview uses one scrollable snapshot timeline instead of duplicating recent activity.

risks.title: Timeline height may need tuning for larger repositories
risks.mitigation: The timeline now scrolls internally and was verified with all current repository snapshots at desktop and mobile sizes.

timeline.title: Removed tab strip vertical overflow
timeline.summary: The repository tab list now hides vertical overflow while preserving horizontal scrolling for small screens.

timeline.title: Added README code copy buttons
timeline.summary: Markdown code blocks render with copy buttons and copied-state feedback.

timeline.title: Consolidated snapshot list
timeline.summary: The overview removes Recent activity and uses the snapshot timeline as the single snapshot list; the Snapshots tab shows the same scrollable timeline with all snapshots.

timeline.title: Improved responsive timeline placement
timeline.summary: The timeline sits beside README content on desktop and stacks below it on mobile.

timeline.title: Ran automated and browser checks
timeline.summary: Verified with UI build, Go tests, Playwright copy action, desktop screenshot, and mobile screenshot.

decisions.title: Keep Recent activity on the Activity tab
decisions.rationale: The user wanted to avoid duplicate snapshot lists on the repository overview; the Activity tab still owns the activity list pattern.

decisions.title: Copy code blocks instead of the full README
decisions.rationale: The reported pain point was visible on README code sections, so block-level copy keeps the action close to the content users need to reuse.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit, vite build, and copy-dist completed successfully from ui/.
Verified README code copy button, overview timeline/all snapshots, desktop side-by-side layout, mobile stacked layout, and tab strip without vertical scrollbar.

artifacts.description: Desktop repository README and snapshot timeline verification screenshot
Mobile repository README and snapshot timeline verification screenshot
